purpose: Maps retrofit strategies to simple 3D or image-generation placement rules.
coordinate_assumption: Use spatial_index wall/window/ceiling IDs; never place objects where no target surface/component exists.

external_shading_louvers.placement_rule: Attach outside selected window wall above/over detected window bbox.
external_shading_louvers.geometry_rule: Width = window width plus side margin; depth projects outward; repeat slats horizontally.
external_shading_louvers.material_rule: matte light metal or timber, high solar reflectance optional.

internal_blinds.placement_rule: Place just inside the selected window plane.

solar_control_glazing.geometry_rule: No added bulk; replace window material properties.

green_pergola.placement_rule: Place outside or on balcony edge of selected solar-exposed window wall.
green_pergola.geometry_rule: Planter boxes with vertical/overhead foliage; keep clear of door/window swing.
green_pergola.material_rule: green foliage with light planter base.
cautions: Do not block emergency egress or required ventilation opening.

window_enlargement.placement_rule: Apply to selected external wall around existing window.
window_enlargement.geometry_rule: Enlarge window rectangle only after structural feasibility flag.
window_enlargement.material_rule: new framed opening with matching wall finish.
cautions: Major structural option; keep as concept unless feasibility confirmed.

interior_opening_improvement.placement_rule: Attach above/within interior door or partition path.
interior_opening_improvement.geometry_rule: Small transom slot or grille object aligned with internal airflow path.

stack_effect_roof_vent.placement_rule: Place on ceiling/roof surface if top-floor or roof-exposed.
stack_effect_roof_vent.geometry_rule: Small vent/diffuser aligned vertically above warm-air zone.
stack_effect_roof_vent.material_rule: white ceiling grille or roof cowl.
cautions: Only show when the unit is top-floor/roof-exposed and roof access or owner approval is feasible.

night_purge_ventilation.placement_rule: Highlight operable window/door path used for night or cross ventilation.
night_purge_ventilation.geometry_rule: Use arrows and small opening-angle marker; no permanent object unless secure limiter is selected.
night_purge_ventilation.material_rule: blue airflow arrows; small metal limiter for secure night vent.

external_wall_insulation_etics.placement_rule: Apply layer to selected external wall surfaces.
external_wall_insulation_etics.geometry_rule: Thin offset surface layer; thickness shown symbolically, not construction detail.

roof_insulation.placement_rule: Apply layer to ceiling/roof plane when top-floor exposed.
roof_insulation.geometry_rule: Thin surface layer on ceiling or roof-adjacent plane.
cautions: Only show when the unit is top-floor/roof-exposed and roof access or owner approval is feasible.

cool_roof_coating.placement_rule: Apply to roof/ceiling proxy surface for top-floor rooms.
cool_roof_coating.geometry_rule: Material override only; no object geometry.
cautions: Only show when the unit is top-floor/roof-exposed and roof access or owner approval is feasible.

phase_change_materials.placement_rule: Apply as interior wall/ceiling panel layer where thermal buffering is proposed.
phase_change_materials.geometry_rule: Thin modular panels on selected wall or ceiling.

courtyard_greening.placement_rule: Place outside room model in site/context view only.
courtyard_greening.geometry_rule: Tree/canopy or courtyard vegetation proxy, not inside room.

shared_cooling_refuge.placement_rule: Do not place in room model; show as report/checkpoint badge.

street_tree_canopy.placement_rule: Place outside room model in site/context view only.
street_tree_canopy.geometry_rule: Tree/canopy or courtyard vegetation proxy, not inside room.

internal_wall_insulation.placement_rule: Place as an interior lining on the room-facing side of selected external wall surfaces.
internal_wall_insulation.geometry_rule: Thin inward offset surface layer over the existing wall; do not extend beyond the exterior facade plane.
internal_wall_insulation.material_rule: light internal insulated lining / reinforced plasterboard finish.
cautions: Do not show as an external projection for older/facade-restricted buildings.
Review moisture/condensation and thermal-bridge details before specification.

wall_insulation_reinforcement_layer.placement_rule: Place as an interior lining on the room-facing side of selected external wall surfaces.
wall_insulation_reinforcement_layer.geometry_rule: Thin inward offset surface layer over the existing wall; do not extend beyond the exterior facade plane.
wall_insulation_reinforcement_layer.material_rule: light internal insulated lining / reinforced plasterboard finish.
cautions: Do not show as an external projection for older/facade-restricted buildings.
Review moisture/condensation and thermal-bridge details before specification.

cool_facade_paint.placement_rule: Apply to selected solar-exposed external wall.

window_external_shutters.placement_rule: Attach to detected window sides or shutter box on external wall.
window_external_shutters.geometry_rule: Two side panels or roller shutter box sized to window.

cross_ventilation_behaviour.placement_rule: Highlight operable window/door path used for night or cross ventilation.
cross_ventilation_behaviour.geometry_rule: Use arrows and small opening-angle marker; no permanent object unless secure limiter is selected.
cross_ventilation_behaviour.material_rule: blue airflow arrows; small metal limiter for secure night vent.

ceiling_fan_air_movement.placement_rule: Center in occupied zone below ceiling, away from tall furniture and window curtains.
ceiling_fan_air_movement.geometry_rule: Simple 3-5 blade fan; radius proportional to room area.
cautions: Check ceiling height and electrical feasibility.

secure_night_vent_limiter.placement_rule: Highlight operable window/door path used for night or cross ventilation.
secure_night_vent_limiter.geometry_rule: Use arrows and small opening-angle marker; no permanent object unless secure limiter is selected.
secure_night_vent_limiter.material_rule: blue airflow arrows; small metal limiter for secure night vent.

balcony_planter_shading.placement_rule: Place outside or on balcony edge of selected solar-exposed window wall.
balcony_planter_shading.geometry_rule: Planter boxes with vertical/overhead foliage; keep clear of door/window swing.
balcony_planter_shading.material_rule: green foliage with light planter base.
cautions: Do not block emergency egress or required ventilation opening.

interior_biophilic_cooling_zone.placement_rule: Place in a daylight corner near but not blocking the window.
interior_biophilic_cooling_zone.geometry_rule: Cluster of potted plants and optional low shelf within occupied zone.
interior_biophilic_cooling_zone.material_rule: varied green foliage, ceramic or timber pots.

tested_component_variants.placement_principle: Use invisible host wall/opening/ceiling zones; do not infer placement from image texture alone.
